name: outreach-smoke
description: Nightly smoke test for the Discover -> Draft pipeline. Fires at 09:00 UTC daily, POSTs a synthetic URL to the Discover webhook, waits 5 min, checks that the item reached 'drafted' or 'reviewed' status, alerts Slack on failure, and cleans up synthetic rows from prior runs (> 1 hour old). Wait is 5 min in prod. No ON DELETE CASCADE on drafts FK — cleanup deletes drafts first, then outreach_items.

parameters.query:
SELECT id, status, source_url
FROM outreach_items
WHERE source_url = $1
  AND status IN ('drafted', 'reviewed')
LIMIT 1;

DELETE FROM drafts
WHERE outreach_item_id IN (
  SELECT id FROM outreach_items
  WHERE source_url LIKE 'https://plotlens.ai/smoke-test/%'
    AND discovered_at < now() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
    AND id NOT IN (
      SELECT DISTINCT d2.outreach_item_id FROM drafts d2
      JOIN approvals a ON a.draft_id = d2.id
    )
);

DELETE FROM outreach_items
WHERE source_url LIKE 'https://plotlens.ai/smoke-test/%'
  AND discovered_at < now() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.outreach_item_id FROM drafts d
    JOIN approvals a ON a.draft_id = d.id
  );
